HEARING RE: DEFENDANT WILLIAM CHEN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The motion is transferred to be heard in department 501 on the same date at 9:30 a.m. This matter must be heard in Dept. 501, which hears all law and motion matters in cases relating to the ownership, acquisition, ownership of or damage to real property. (See SF Local Rule 8.10(A).)

Defendant William Chen Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Heather A. Bourne, 510-540-4881 for Defendant William Chen.
